feature_completeness_summary: AP-01 added a shared asset resolver in FGameConfig, AP-02 migrated the targeted tactical/startup/icon-loading call sites to it, and AP-03 locked the resolver and zoom-image regression coverage without leaving plan gaps.

findings.summary: GuiTests hit an environment-specific Wayland/Xvfb connection reset during reviewer reruns; non-GUI validation and focused source/runtime coverage still support the feature verdict.

assumptions: The shared reviewer definition at /home/tstephen/repos/agents/agents/reviewer.md governs because no repository-local reviewer definition was provided in the assigned worktree.
Root-executable asset resolution is adequately covered by the delivered resolver logic and focused regression/tests even though reviewer reruns exercised test-tree binaries.
